section.title: Everything you need to know.
section.subtitle: Can't find your answer here? Reach out to us on WhatsApp—we're always happy to help.

questions.a: Yes. Our collection features premium anti-tarnish jewellery designed to retain its shine with proper care, making it perfect for everyday wear and special occasions.

questions.q: Can I wear the jewellery every day?
questions.a: Absolutely. Our lightweight and comfortable designs are curated for everyday styling while also being elegant enough for parties, celebrations, and gifting.
Yes. We offer secure Pan India shipping with carefully packed orders to ensure your jewellery arrives safely and beautifully presented.

questions.q: How should I care for my jewellery?
questions.a: Store your jewellery in a dry place, avoid direct contact with perfumes, lotions, and harsh chemicals, and wipe it gently with a soft cloth after use to maintain its shine.

questions.q: Is the jewellery suitable for gifting?
questions.a: Definitely. Our timeless collections make thoughtful gifts for birthdays, anniversaries, festivals, weddings, and other special occasions.

questions.q: How can I place an order or ask a question?
questions.a: You can browse our collection on Instagram or contact us directly through WhatsApp or Instagram DM. We'll be happy to help you choose the perfect piece.
